content: Wants to build a full toolkit-style worksheet for their ENG204 students that includes plug-and-play thesis templates, full examples for summaries, paraphrases, and drop quotes, and sample versions of every scaffold. They want the examples to come from popular literary or mythic texts that have broad cultural resonance. User has selected *The Odyssey*, the Bible, and Shakespeare as the core literary sources for examples in their ENG204 toolkit. These texts will be used to provide all scaffolded examples, including thesis templates, summaries, paraphrases, drop quotes, and paragraph constructions. The goal is to create a complete toolkit that teaches source integration, thesis construction, and paragraph assembly in a modular and reusable way. All thesis examples should model complex, specific structures that acknowledge nuance and relationships between multiple ideas. Each thesis should include at least three clear, interrelated points or ideas. User prefers documents with generous white space for student handwriting, especially in worksheets.
